headline: Pinnacle West Sets Date for 2026 Second-Quarter Financial Results, Webcast/Conference Call
summary: PHOENIX, July 08, 2026--Pinnacle West Capital Corp. plans to release its 2026 second-quarter financial results before U.S. financial markets open on Tuesday, Aug. 4, 2026.
